_doc: Implementation backlog for the single sequential Ralph loop. SOURCE OF TRUTH for done/not-done + dependency order; docs/HARNESS.md §8.1 = schema. Each task's `do` + `done-when` live in a per-task Markdown spec at the `spec` path (.harness/tasks/TNNN.md, sections '## Do' / '## Done when'); every BUILDABLE task carries `facets` (difficulty auto-tuning) — a needs-human gated task is carved out and carries none. `gate` is `null` (buildable) or `needs-human` (a one-time human step). To require a human to review a deliverable BEFORE dependents proceed, author the work as a normal buildable task plus a separate `needs-human` review task that dependsOn it, and point the dependents at the review task. These are ILLUSTRATIVE EXAMPLES showing the schema, the needs-human gate, the spec-file convention, and facets — REPLACE them (and their tasks/*.md specs) with your own atomic, dependency-ordered tasks before running the loop.

tasks.title: Harness bootstrap on the existing app — CI green on main
